utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 required items in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, plus total_budget (making it 7 total). The final package includes: destination (present), travel_dates (present but not specific dates—just 'July 1-5, Summer 2024' has dates but year mismatch with 'Summer 2024' unclear—still counts as specific), transportation (has type, route, and cost—no exact flight numbers/times but format only asks 'flight details with costs'; this is minimally satisfied), accommodation (hotel selection with costs—name given as 'Historic Lodge' with rating, duration, and cost; acceptable), activities (listed with costs—present), additional_services (present but contains an email to a questionable domain and no cost; format asks 'any extra services with costs'—no costs provided, so not fully specified), total_budget (complete cost breakdown—there is a total budget and a separate cost_breakdown that sums to €1,700; this meets requirement). Count: 7 items requested. Included: destination (1), travel_dates (2), transportation (3), accommodation (4), activities (5), additional_services (lacks costs, so not fully specified), total_budget (7). Thus 6 fully specified out of 7.
